series_metadata.series_title: Deputy Registrar Universal Vehicle Registration App.
series_metadata.series_description: Record is comprised of paper copies of motor vehicle registration applications and supporting documents that are retained by the Deputy Registrar agencies in accordance with the Deputy Registrar Manual.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: a period of thirty (30) months from date of record or transaction, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Machine readable copies of these records are retained according BASS Database schedule #760-1290
